case_title: PAUL ZHU VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED AUG-29-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHU, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-03-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAUL ZHU IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO REPRESENTED BY MARLA GREEN CLAIM ADJUSTER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PARTIES MUST ATTEND NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-08-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PAUL ZHU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARLEEN GREEN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO HEARING. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-08-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
